PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-27-2007 Continued To Jan-23-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Stella Edralin for John Di Pietro. Jonathan Ferdon for the San Francisco Public Administrator ("SFPA").

Mr. Ferdon reported that there were too many unknowns, that there was no nomination, and that more information was needed regarding the family tree. The Court continued the matter to January 23, 2008. Ms. Edralin will provide more information regarding the relatives. Mr. Ferdon stated that the SFPA will act if the Court is not satisfied.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Smith.
